---
page-layout: full
toc: false

listing:
  - id: nouvelles-listing
    contents:
      - news
    type: default
    image-align: right
    image-height: 1.05in
    sort:
      - "date desc"
    fields: [image, date, title]
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
---

::: {.cara-page .cara-news-page}

::: {.cara-team-hero .cara-news-hero}

::: {.cara-kicker}
Actualités de la Chaire
:::

# Nouvelles et événements

:::


::: {.cara-section}

::: {.cara-section-header}
:::

::: {#nouvelles-listing .cara-news-listing}
:::

:::

:::
